kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Username And Valid Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Is Redirected To Secure Area With Success Message
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_002 Failed Login With Incorrect Password

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Username And Invalid Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Remains On Login Page With Invalid Password Error
Verify User Is On Login Page
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Verify Invalid Password Error Message Is Displayed
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 5 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 5 seconds.
Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 5 seconds.
Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 5 seconds.

test.name: TC_003 Failed Login With Incorrect Username

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When User Enters Invalid Username And Valid Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Remains On Login Page With Invalid Username Error
Verify User Is On Login Page
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Verify Invalid Username Error Message Is Displayed
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
